shared_properties: Stage props use the same academy hall material language with carved wood, gold trim, and dark panel shadows.
Core palette metadata remains primary #5C3317, background #2B1B17, and accent #D4AF37 while window light colors appear inside specs.colors_hex.
The asset is authored for transparent compositing so the backdrop remains the dominant opaque layer.
differences: The set provides the raised enemy podium, lower player platform edge, and arched window accents that frame the duel vertically.
Window glow concentrates behind the enemy half of the arena to reinforce the upper threat source.
Prop density avoids the projectile lane so the center of the screen remains reserved for combat reads.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the duel loop, projectile attributes, UI layout, and Bevy runtime constraints for Reflect Academy.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the warm academy hall mood, layered duel composition, and luminous spell contrast.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load podium_window_set.png during Loading and spawn it above the backdrop but below characters.
runtime_notes: Use transparent pixels around the podium and window clusters so character feet and projectile silhouettes remain unobstructed.
Keep the enemy podium anchor aligned with the enemy_caster_duel_loop world position.
Do not animate the prop layer during combat.

context.usage: Static support layer that frames the combatants and clarifies each lane without adding gameplay noise.

composition: Enemy podium occupies the upper-right quadrant.
Player platform trim occupies the lower-left edge only.
Window glow stays behind the enemy lane and avoids the center projectile corridor.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 1920x600 px with transparent pixels outside the prop art.
The player and enemy anchor zones remain unobscured when character sprites are composited in place.
Window glow does not reduce contrast for thunder or fire projectiles passing through the center lane.
